meanings.definition: make into a whole or make part of a whole
examples: She incorporated his suggestions into her proposal

meanings.definition: include or contain; have as a component
examples: A totally new idea is comprised in this paper
The record contains many old songs from the 1930's

meanings.definition: unite or merge with something already in existence
examples: incorporate this document with those pertaining to the same case

meanings.definition: formed or united into a whole
